servinfo.title: Excessive engine oil consumption – Oil entering combustion chamber
servinfo.ptxt: Perform troubleshooting referring to the following points when ECM has detected no DTC and no abnormality has been found in Visual Inspection and Engine Basic Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Excessive engine oil consumption – Oil entering combustion chamber

ptxt.intxref: Cylinder, Piston and Piston Ring Inspection
Cylinder, Piston and Piston Ring Inspection

ps.ptxt: Worn piston ring groove and ring

ptxt.intxref: Cylinder, Piston and Piston Ring Inspection

ps.ptxt: Improper location of piston ring gap

ptxt.intxref: Piston, Piston Ring, Connecting Rod and Cylinder Disassembly and Reassembly

ps.ptxt: Worn or damaged valve stem seal
